options.name: --cache-file-path
options.description:
Overrides the file path where analysis data is cached.
Defaults to the "<workingdirectory>/.packageguard/cache.bin"

options.name: --config-path
options.description:
The path to the configuration file. Defaults to
hierarchical discovery of packageguard.config.json or .packageguard/config.json
files starting from the solution directory.

options.name: --force-restore
options.description:
Force restoring the NuGet dependencies, even if the
lockfile is up-to-date

options.name: --github-api-key
options.description:
GitHub API key to use for fetching package licenses. If not
specified, you may run into GitHub's rate limiting issues.

options.name: --ignore-violations
options.description:
Don't fail the analysis if any violations are found.
Defaults to false.

options.name: --npm
options.description:
Explicitly specify the package manager to use (npm, yarn,
pnpm). If not specified, it will detect it automatically.

options.name: --npm-exe-path
options.description:
The path to the npm, yarn or pnpm executable. If not
specified, the system PATH is used.

options.name: --nuget
options.description:
Explicitly enable or disable scanning for .csproj, .sln or
.slnx files

options.name: --refresh-risk-cache
options.description:
Force --report-risk to rebuild risk-related package data
instead of reusing cached risk entries.

options.name: --report-risk
options.description:
Show a colored risk summary in the console and generate
detailed HTML/SARIF risk reports. Optionally provide a directory or file path.
Directories receive generated file names; explicit filenames are used directly
and may overwrite prior files.

options.name: --restore-interactive
options.description:
Allow enabling or disabling an interactive mode of "dotnet
restore". Defaults to true

options.name: --risk-cache-max-age-hours
options.description:
Maximum age in hours for cached risk-related package data
before --report-risk refreshes it.

options.name: --skip-restore
options.description:
Prevent the restore operation from running, even if the
lock file is missing or out-of-date

options.name: --use-caching
options.description:
Maintains a cache of the package information to speed up
future analysis.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
The path to a directory containing a .sln/.slnx file and/or
a package.json, a specific .sln/.slnx file, a specific .csproj file, or a 
specific package.json. Defaults to the current working directory
